title: Polymer Product & Application Engineer
description:
Ingersoll Rand is committed to achieving workforce diversity reflective of our communities. We are an equal opportunity employer. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to age, ancestry, color, family or medical care leave, gender identity or expression, genetic information, marital status, medical condition, national origin, physical or mental disability, political affiliation, protected veteran status, race, religion, sex (including pregnancy), sexual orientation, or any other characteristic protected by applicable laws, regulations and ordinances.
   

  

**Job Title**
 Polymer Product \\& Process Engineer
   

  

**Location**
 India \\- Hyderabad (SSI) (INTSHYR)
   

  

**About Us**
 SSI Aeration is a global leader in the design and manufacture of advanced water and wastewater treatment equipment. SSI specializes in high‑efficiency diffused aeration systems—including fine bubble and coarse bubble diffusers, tube and disc diffusers, and complete aeration system designs
   

  

 SSI is known for its technical innovation, holding multiple patents for advanced membrane technologies such as
 **PTFE‑coated EPDM** 
 , as well as engineering software that optimizes diffuser system design
   

  

 The company maintains ISO 9001:2015 quality certification and operates globally with teams in the
 **US, UK, Netherlands, Korea, China, and India** 
 , supported by distributors in over
 **70 countries** 
 with a mission to deliver durable, energy‑efficient, and cost‑effective aeration solutions that enhance water quality and support environmental sustainability worldwide
   

  

**Job Summary**
 Plastic \\& Rubber Knowledge Engineer to support material selection, product development, and manufacturing improvement. The role focuses on polymers, elastomers, molding processes, and troubleshooting material\\-related issues to ensure high\\-quality and reliable components
   

  

**Responsibilities**
* Select suitable plastic and rubber materials based on application and performance.
* Support design and manufacturing teams with material and process expertise.
* Troubleshoot molding/extrusion/vulcanization defects and perform root cause analysis.
* Conduct and coordinate material testing (tensile, hardness, aging, compression set).
* Prepare material specifications, test reports, and technical documentation.
* Work with suppliers to qualify and improve material quality


**Basic Qualifications**
* Bachelor’s degree in Polymer Science, Materials Engineering, Mechanical/Chemical Engineering, or related field.
* 2–5 years of experience in plastics, elastomers, or polymer processing.
* Knowledge of injection molding, extrusion, or rubber compounding.
* Strong analytical and problem\\-solving skills


**Travel \\& Work Arrangements/Requirements**
 Fully site based and ready for international travel for training and trouble shootings
   

  

**Key Competencies**
 Absolute KEY skills needed for role
   

  

* Strong understanding of polymer science, elastomer behavior, compounding, curing, and degradation.
* Knowledge of common materials (EPDM, NBR, Silicone, TPU, PP, PE, Nylon, PVC, etc.).
* Ability to interpret material datasheets, rheology, and physical property behavior.
* Ability to recommend suitable materials based on mechanical, thermal, and chemical requirements.
* Experience comparing materials for cost, performance, and manufacturability.
* Knowledge of molding (injection, compression, transfer), extrusion, calendaring, vulcanization, and thermoforming.
* Awareness of tooling design considerations (draft, gating, shrinkage, parting lines).
* Ability to troubleshoot defects such as warpage, tearing, porosity, surface defects, and incomplete curing.
* Familiarity with ASTM/ISO material testing standards (durometer, tensile, elongation, compression set, aging, swelling).
* Ability to design test plans and interpret results.
* Experience with quality tools like SPC, FMEA, control plans, and root cause analysis.
* Ability to propose corrective actions and prevent recurrence.
* Understanding of process parameters affecting material performance.
* Experience reducing scrap, improving cycle times, and optimizing curing/processing conditions.
* Works closely with design, manufacturing, purchasing, suppliers, and quality teams.
* Ability to translate technical material concepts into practical engineering solutions.
* Experience in supplier development and vendor qualification.
* Ability to write clear material specifications, test reports, SOPs, and technical guidelines.
* Skilled in presenting technical findings to internal teams and customers.
* Strong communication for training teams on polymer/rubber concepts.
* Familiarity with CAD (SolidWorks/AutoCAD) for component evaluation.
* Use of laboratory instruments for material characterization.
* Ability to support new product development through material experiments.
* Willingness to explore advanced polymers, coatings, and technologies.
* Experience in prototype evaluation and scaling from lab to production.


**What We Offer**
 Our benefits – location dependant annual leave allowance, pension etc, but ALWAYS include Shares options
   

  

 Ingersoll Rand Inc. (NYSE:IR), driven by an entrepreneurial spirit and ownership mindset, is dedicated to helping make life better for our employees, customers and communities. Customers lean on us for our technology\\-driven excellence in mission\\-critical flow creation and industrial solutions across 40\\+ respected brands where our products and services excel in the most complex and harsh conditions. Our employees develop customers for life through their daily commitment to expertise, productivity and efficiency. For more information, visit www.IRCO.com.

**Job \\& Division Summary**
 The System Test Lead will be responsible for planning, designing, and executing end\\-to\\-end system testing for a SaaS\\-based server application that communicates with multiple networked devices. This role ensures the server and connected devices function as expected, covering configuration, data collection, and integration scenarios. The candidate will lead the testing strategy, plan and track execution, define automation frameworks, and ensure quality across deployments.

The system test lead will play a key role in driving our growth strategy through engineering excellence and delivering on our promise of reliability and superior customer experiences.

* Drive automation for system\\-level tests and regression suites.
* Manage defect tracking and root cause analysis.
* Collaborate on release readiness and performance validation.


**Mandatory Skills**
* Strong experience in system testing for distributed systems or SaaS products.

* Familiarity with configuring \\& testing connected device communications.

* Knowledge of and hands\\-on experience in performance, scalability \\& reliability testing.
* Familiarity with security testing for SaaS applications.
* Expert\\-level knowledge of at least one defect management tool (eg. Jira, Bugzilla)
* Excellent analytical, planning and tracking skills.


**Desired Skills**
* Test Certifications: ISTQB as advanced Test Lead, Certified Agile Tester, or similar.
* Knowledge of Power Focus Open Protocol (PF OP)
* Knowledge of Manufacturing Execution Systems (MES)
* Experience with white\\-box testing for data transfer \\& integrity
* Knowledge of security threat modeling, vulnerability assessment, and compliance testing.


**Qualifications**
* Bachelor’s Degree in Computer Science, Computer Applications or equivalent.
* 8\\+ years in testing, with at least 2 years in a lead role


**What We Offer**

* Leave Encashments

* Employee Assistance Program

* Collaborative, multicultural work environment with a team of dedicated professionals, fostering innovation and teamwork.


 Ingersoll Rand Inc. (NYSE:IR), driven by an entrepreneurial spirit and ownership mindset, is dedicated to helping make life better for our employees, customers and communities. Customers lean on us for our technology\\-driven excellence in mission\\-critical flow creation and industrial solutions across 40\\+ respected brands where our products and services excel in the most complex and harsh conditions. title: Global IT Configuration Engineer Senior Specialist
description:
Who We Are
   

  

 Boston Consulting Group partners with leaders in business and society to tackle their most important challenges and capture their greatest opportunities. BCG was the pioneer in business strategy when it was founded in 1963\\. Today, we help clients with total transformation\\-inspiring complex change, enabling organizations to grow, building competitive advantage, and driving bottom\\-line impact.
   

  

 To succeed, organizations must blend digital and human capabilities. Our diverse, global teams bring deep industry and functional expertise and a range of perspectives to spark change. BCG delivers solutions through leading\\-edge management consulting along with technology and design, corporate and digital ventures—and business purpose. We work in a uniquely collaborative model across the firm and throughout all levels of the client organization, generating results that allow our clients to thrive.
   

  

 What You'll Do
   

  

 As an IT HR Workday Configuration Engineer in BCG’s IT HR Systems Group you will have the responsibility for functional \\& technical updates to Workday, BCG's global HR application, with a concentration in ATime Off. We are kicking off a multi\\-phased global implementation, and this is a key role for the implementation. You will need to partner with our implementation vendor to successfully implement Time Off to approximately 25 countries, and then will be part of the implementation for phases 2 and 3\\. You will work with the Lead Time Off BA on the team, as well as the functional team to advocate and support end user requirements and prepare and demonstrate functionality for the leadership team. Additionally, you will provide ongoing support on Workday ranging from enhancement requests, day to day operational activities, as well as keep key team members aware of new functionality and enhancements.
   

  

 What You'll Bring
   

  

* Experience in supporting technical needs for the HR domain and specifically, experience in Workday is required
* Ability to participate in design and configuration workshops for implementation projects as well as enhancement projects
* Create clear and comprehensive change documents for application modifications and new functionality additions, for Workday
* Analyze and implement application configurations
* Develop and execute comprehensive test plans to ensure high quality prior to deployment
* Experience working with customers to gather requirements and translating them into system/technology requirements is a must
* History of working with confidential data is preferred
* Bachelor’s Degree with 3\\+ years of experience in a technical support and/or software development role preferred.
* Experience supporting large corporate applications and systems.
* Strong technical troubleshooting skills, including debugging and analysis of performance issues.
* Strong communication skills and ability to work closely with users and provide a high level of customer service in a friendly, professional manner.
* Able to generate and analyze data and reports (Strong Excel \\& PowerPoint Experience).
* Experience in a Global environment preferred.


 Who You'll Work With
   

  

 The Global IT Configuration Engineer will join a team of
   

  

* Other members of the HR IT team, including Workday Delivery Team (other Workday team members supporting all aspects of the Workday platform)
* Global HR stakeholders to prioritize, document, and test enhancements to existing systems
* Integration and QA Teams as need


 Additional info
   

  

**YOU’RE GOOD AT**
 To be successful, this individual must
   

  

* Have a sense of urgency in task execution, be well organized, able to solve complex issues and be interested in meeting high expectations while working in a very rewarding environment offering exceptional opportunities for learning and growth
* Ability to partner with the business to understand needs and translate them into technology requirements, using a consultative approach to understand the system functionality and apply that knowledge to solutioning / working with the business on process efficiencies
* Be proficient with functional \\& technical support on Workday
* Under the direction of the HR Systems Director, work with the HR \\& IT HR teams in the planning and execution of Workday’s functional/technical projects through our Agile process
* Manage and configure updates to Workday by partnering with the product team, documenting requirements, tracking updates through Jira, and managing updates through sprint process
* Be the voice of the customer, advocate on behalf of our user base to increase their experience and satisfaction with Workday
* Represent the technical team for the health of the Time Off and Absence areas of Workday, in terms of quality of operational effectiveness from a functional \\& technical standpoint
* Work closely with software vendor in the planning and design of application changes (including upgrades) and coordinating on delivery and deployment processes
* Stay abreast of functional \\& development tools, trends and practices, and act as an evangelist for items that should be considered for future initiative


 Boston Consulting Group is an Equal Opportunity Employer. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, age, religion, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity / expression, national origin, disability, protected veteran status, or any other characteristic protected under national, provincial, or local law, where applicable, and those with criminal histories will be considered in a manner consistent with applicable state and local laws.

description:

 HighLevel is a cloud\\-based, all\\-in\\-one white\\-label marketing and sales platform that empowers marketing agencies, entrepreneurs, and businesses to elevate their digital presence and drive growth. We are proud to support a global and growing community of over 2 million businesses, from marketing agencies to entrepreneurs to small businesses and beyond. Our platform empowers users across industries to streamline operations, drive growth, and crush their goals.
   

  

 HighLevel processes over 15 billion API hits and handles more than 2\\.5 billion message events every day. Our platform manages 470 terabytes of data distributed across five databases, operates with a network of over 250 micro\\-services, and supports over 1 million domain names.
   

  

**Our People**
 With over 1,500 team members across 15\\+ countries, we operate in a global, remote\\-first environment. We are building more than software; we are building a global community rooted in creativity, collaboration, and impact. We take pride in cultivating a culture where innovation thrives, ideas are celebrated, and people come first, no matter where they call home.
   

  

**Our Impact**
 Every month, our platform powers over 1\\.5 billion messages, helps generate over 200 million leads, and facilitates over 20 million conversations for the more than 2 million businesses we serve. Behind those numbers are real people growing their companies, connecting with customers, and making their mark \\- and we get to help make that happen.
   

  

 Learn more about us on our YouTube Channel or Blog Posts
   

  

**About The Role**
 We are looking for a highly experienced
 **Lead Engineer** 
 to take technical ownership of our
 **Social Planner product suite** 
 , which enables users to connect social accounts, schedule and publish posts, manage comments, and analyze performance through real\\-time dashboards. This role will also help drive improvements across our
 **Media Optimization system** 
 , ensuring we deliver a world\\-class experience for millions of users.
   

  

 You will lead a team of talented engineers, shape technical direction, modernize architecture, and ensure the platform remains reliable, scalable, and high\\-performing as we continue to expand.
   

  

 This is a high\\-impact leadership role for someone who thrives in complex distributed systems, loves solving tough technical challenges, and enjoys building products used at massive scale.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
* Lead architecture, design, and development of the Social Planner \\& Media Optimization platforms.
* Own end\\-to\\-end reliability, performance, and scalability of distributed systems.
* Design and maintain fault\\-tolerant pipelines for posting, media processing, analytics, and comment workflows.
* Drive modernization efforts: event\\-driven patterns, improved data models, and microservice decomposition.
* Establish a long\\-term technical roadmap and make impactful architectural decisions.
* Mentor, guide, and support backend, frontend, and full\\-stack engineers.
* Conduct meaningful code reviews and enforce engineering best practices.
* Collaborate with Product, Design, Data, and Support teams to deliver high\\-impact features.
* Ensure high standards in code quality and documentation.
* Improve posting reliability, delivery accuracy, retries, and error handling.
* Build and optimize dashboards for analytics, scheduling workflows, and comment moderation.
* Enhance media processing systems: compression, transcoding, storage, and CDN usage.
* Troubleshoot complex production issues and lead root cause analyses.
* Optimize performance across databases, search indexes, queues, and backend services.
* Ensure platform security, privacy, and multi\\-tenant isolation best practices.


**Requirements**
* 8\\+ years of full\\-stack engineering experience with significant backend/system design exposure.
* Deep expertise in distributed systems and event\\-driven architecture.
* Strong experience with asynchronous job processing and background workers.
* Solid understanding of both relational and NoSQL databases (MongoDB, ClickHouse preferred).Proven ability to build scalable, multi\\-tenant SaaS applications.
* Strong experience with modern frontend frameworks (Vue.js, React, or Angular).Ability to design and optimize interactive dashboards and data\\-heavy UIs.
* Excellent understanding of software design patterns, API design, and microservices.
* Hands\\-on experience with CI/CD pipelines, TDD, and automated testing frameworks.
* Strong performance tuning, profiling, and optimization skills (especially Node.js).Experience with caching, rate limiting, and queuing systems.
* Proven experience integrating third\\-party APIs (preferably social media APIs).Strong knowledge of Elasticsearch for search, indexing, and analytics.
* Experience using Redis for caching, session storage, or background queues.
* Experience leading engineering teams or acting as a technical lead.
* Strong communication skills with the ability to work cross\\-functionally.
* Ability to make clear architectural trade\\-offs and guide team decision\\-making.


**Bonus Skills**
* Contributions to open\\-source tools, internal platforms or engineering blogsExperience with observability tools (Prometheus, Grafana, OpenTelemetry).
* Knowledge of media processing, compression, encoding, and CDN workflows.
* Exposure to AI\\-driven content tools or automation systems.
* Experience with domain\\-driven design and system decomposition.
